{{Relic Infobox|Music Box|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Ethereal|2}}
{{R|Music Box||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. It creates an {{KW|Ethereal||2}} copy of the first {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} you play each turn.

== Obtaining Music Box ==
Can be offered at the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}} by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
* The copy is created after the {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} resolves, meaning a copied {{C|Rampage||2}} will have its damage already increased and a copied {{C|Fiend Fire||2}} will not be immediately {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausted|2}}.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Music Box to the game.
